hooks.command: echo '{"additionalContext": "PROJECT: Gyst. PHASE: V1. FOCUS: MCP server + learn/recall + SQLite/FTS5 + git hook. DO NOT build V2 features (Slack, Turso, vector search). CHECK .claude/memory/MEMORY.md for current build state before doing anything. CHECK .claude/memory/what-failed.md to avoid repeating past mistakes."}'
bun run src/cli/index.ts emit session_start 2>/dev/null || true
bun run src/cli/index.ts emit prompt 2>/dev/null || true
bun run src/cli/index.ts emit tool_use 2>/dev/null || true
bun run src/cli/index.ts emit session_end 2>/dev/null || true
bun run src/cli/index.ts emit pre_compact 2>/dev/null || true
